# html-tags

> HTML/SVG generation via python functions.

- [node](/node): Node, Safe
- [attrs](/attrs): normalize_attrs
- [ns](/ns): child_ns
- [render](/render): render
- [dsl](/dsl): TagFactory
- [viz_scale](/viz_scale): Scale, LinearScale, BandScale, HueScale, OrdinalHueScale
- [viz_mark](/viz_mark): rect, circle, line, polyline, path, path_d, area_d, text, group
- [viz_axis](/viz_axis): axis
- [viz_chart](/viz_chart): Margin, BoundMargin, chart

- [llms-full.txt](/llms-full.txt): Complete source code
